Assignment - Class in <Unnamed>
Represents a school assignment with a due date, estimated study hours, and reminder settings.

sendReminder(Assignment) - Method in class Notification

sortAssignmentsByDueDate() - Method in class StudySchedule
Sorts assignments by closest due date.
StudySchedule - Class in <Unnamed>
Manages assignments by sorting them and calculating daily study workload.

Abstract parent class that represents a general task.
